---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: VinitaSilaparasetty
---

## Summary
A clear, one-sentence description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed solution
Describe how you'd like it to work. Be as specific as you can — API shape, CLI flags, config options, UI changes, etc.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Web3 context
If this is specific to a protocol, chain, or doc source (e.g. Solana, EVM, IPFS), mention it here so we can prioritise accordingly.

## Additional context
Links, mockups, related issues, or prior art that might help.
